message:
feat(codegen): implement SELECT DISTINCT in VDBE codegen (bd-1t8h)

Adds codegen_select_distinct_scan() for DISTINCT without ORDER BY,
using a sorter-based approach: scan all output columns as sort keys,
sort, then iterate with MakeRecord + Eq to skip adjacent duplicates.

Also adds DISTINCT dedup logic to the ORDER BY path via packed-record
comparison in pass 2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
